description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a dark brown finish, featuring a simple and sturdy design. The tabletop is flat and smooth, supported by four straight legs connected by horizontal braces for added stability. The wood grain is visible across the surface, giving it a natural and rustic appearance. The table has no drawers, shelves, or decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and durability. Its proportions suggest it could comfortably seat several people or serve as a work surface. The overall construction appears robust, making it suitable for both communal and utilitarian use in urban environments.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden table with a dark brown finish and visible wood grain, supported by four straight legs with horizontal braces.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the narrow width of the tabletop and the two supporting legs with a horizontal brace.
description_view_1: Full-length side view displaying the entire tabletop surface and all four legs, highlighting the table's rectangular shape.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, similar to view 0, showing the narrow tabletop and leg structure from the other side.
description_view_3: Full-length side view identical to view 1, showing the tabletop and leg arrangement from the opposite side.
